word: H6284 - פָּאָה - pâʼâh - paw-aw' - Scatter into corners

sections.paragraph:
Original: פּאה

Transliteration: pâ'âh

Phonetic: paw-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to cleave in pieces, break into pieces, shatter
    1. (Hiphil) to cleave in pieces, dash to pieces

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1725

Part(s) of speech: Verb
